entries.title: M313 Dev Diary — News Pipeline, Asset Snapshots & Release Tooling
entries.summary: M313 wires up four infrastructure features: a public/news/ content pipeline with a Latest News widget, versioned asset snapshots per milestone, changelog category tags in release.sh, and backward-compatibility notes surfaced in the What's New splash.

entries.title: Sets and Uniques System — Full Item Tier Overhaul in M305
entries.summary: M305 shipped 24 set items (12 two-piece Sigon-style, 8 mid three-piece, 4 endgame four/five-piece), 24 unique items across 5 acts, 40 new affixes, and legendary mechanical effects with onCrit/onKill/onCast/onCombatStart hooks.

entries.title: Infinite Depths — Endless Dungeon Mode Ships in M306
entries.summary: M306 introduced Infinite Run mode — a procedurally scaled endless dungeon that ramps difficulty every 5 floors, awards exclusive affixes, and persists a personal best score across sessions.

entries.title: M302 Gameplay Batch — Companion Sync, Flee Mechanic & New Rogue Skills
entries.summary: M302 landed companion level-sync, a DEX-check flee mechanic, two new Rogue skills (Pilfer Magic and Hemorrhage), Warlock Soul Curse with curse-spread, skill-check map nodes, and a full node-overlay system for merchant, minigame, and bandit encounters.
